docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-31-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-31-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JOSE UNTALAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT VIOLETA MONTEMAYOR IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2017 - JUDGMENT.
